context: Paul became Onesimus's spiritual father by convincing him of the truth of Christ (see [[1CO.4:15]]; [[GAL.4:19]]).
Onesimus stole from or otherwise wronged Philemon when he ran away. Put that on my account is reminiscent of how Christ has taken away our sins that we might go free ([[2CO.5:21]]; 8:9).
Paul became Onesimus's spiritual father by convincing him of the truth of Christ (see [[1CO.4:15]]; [[GAL.4:19]]).
